_sources.cav_target_2075: California autonomous-vehicle testing framework; adopted AV fleet share projection from CARB analysis
_sources.sti_target_2075: Caltrans smart-corridor program; inferred coverage target from funded intersections
_sources.bev_growth_rate: CARB Advanced Clean Cars II mandate (100% ZEV sales by 2035); DOE AFDC 2019-2024 registration CAGR ~45%
_sources.low_carbon_electricity_growth: SB 100 (100% clean electricity by 2045); EIA 2024 California electricity generation mix
_sources.hardware_doubling_years: Industry consensus on compute-efficiency trajectory; not state-specific

_sources.cav_target_2075: No Ohio statewide CAV mandate; lower adoption ceiling based on ODOT AV pilot scope
_sources.sti_target_2075: Ohio TSMO (Transportation Systems Management and Operations) smart-signal deployment; lower coverage baseline
_sources.bev_growth_rate: DOE AFDC 2019-2024 Ohio BEV registration CAGR ~30%; no state ZEV mandate
_sources.low_carbon_electricity_growth: EIA 2024 Ohio electricity mix (coal+gas ~75%); no statewide clean-energy mandate
